project_type: Android WebView clock app - UI rendered via bundled HTML/CSS/JS in assets/web/
build_system: Gradle (AGP 8.5.2, Kotlin 1.9.24) - no build needed for web assets changes
test_framework: No automated tests - visual verification only
build_command: N/A for CSS/JS changes (web assets are bundled as-is)
test_command: N/A - visual UI changes, verify by reading the code
verification_instructions: 1. Review CSS changes to confirm z-index stacking is correct. 2. Review that overflow:hidden is removed from row-fixed header. 3. Verify gap values are reduced. 4. Confirm scrim divs get proper z-index.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - changes are to static web assets
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no package installs possible. Changes are purely to static CSS/JS/HTML files.
contribution_requirements: Each fix in a branch, PR based workflow. Web assets at app/src/main/assets/web/
key_patterns: Layout system uses <template> elements cloned into #layoutHost. CSS uses .flex-layout with .row-fixed (header/footer) and .row-fill (main content). z-index stacking: slideshow-host=0, row-fixed/row-fill=1, template content uses 'relative z-10' class. Scrim divs are 'absolute inset-0' with gradient backgrounds.
directory_structure: app/src/main/assets/web/ contains index.html (layout templates), css/screen.css (all styles), js/clock.js (layout logic, config, rendering)
